global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with promotional text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute travel savings on hotels and flights.

elements.label: Green abstract background
elements.description: A vibrant green abstract background with geometric shapes creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: Promotional content area
elements.description: A prominent rectangular area in the center featuring a light green shape, suggesting a product or service being highlighted.

elements.label: Top decorative shape
elements.description: A light green oval shape positioned at the top, adding a decorative touch to the ad.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold, dark text stating 'Last-minute savings' prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Additional details
elements.description: Smaller dark text below the main text, reading 'Hotels + flights in one tap' to provide more information.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A small dark text displaying the price '€9.99' positioned below the main promotional text.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, labeled 'CloudRoute', in a simple and modern font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom with the text 'Start now', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Bottom area
elements.description: A large area at the bottom of the ad that serves as a visual anchor but contains no specific identifiable elements.
elements.text_content: Last-minute savings Hotels + flights in one tap

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: A small text element displaying the brand name 'CloudRoute' in a modern font at the top.

elements.label: Call to action text
elements.description: A small text element at the bottom reading 'Start now', encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small text element displaying the price '€9.99', indicating the cost of the service.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main promotional text is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
